did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing existing literature on the use of AI in dermatopathology. It discusses various AI methods (e.g., convolutional neural networks, natural language processing) and their applications in diagnosis, education, and research, but it does not present original research where the authors used AI to obtain new study results. Instead, it reviews studies conducted by others.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
